===/developers/model-capabilities/text/multi-agent===
# Multi Agent

> This feature is currently in **beta**.

curl https://api.x.ai/v1/responses -d '{"model": "grok-4.20-multi-agent"}'

### Supported Models

* `grok-4.20-multi-agent`


===/developers/model-capabilities/text/generate-text===
# Generate Text

curl https://api.x.ai/v1/responses -d '{"model": "grok-4.5"}'


===/developers/model-capabilities/legacy/chat-completions===
# Chat Completions

curl https://api.x.ai/v1/chat/completions -d '{"model": "grok-4.5"}'


===/developers/model-capabilities/images/generation===
# Image Generation

curl https://api.x.ai/v1/images/generations -d '{"model": "grok-imagine-image-quality"}'


===/developers/model-capabilities/images/editing===
# Image Editing

curl https://api.x.ai/v1/images/edits -d '{"model": "grok-imagine-image-quality"}'


===/developers/model-capabilities/video/generation===
# Video Generation

curl https://api.x.ai/v1/videos/generations -d '{"model": "grok-imagine-video"}'


===/developers/model-capabilities/imagine===
# Imagine

curl https://api.x.ai/v1/videos/generations -d '{"model": "grok-imagine-video-1.5"}'


===/developers/model-capabilities/audio/speech-to-speech===
# Speech to Speech API

wss://api.x.ai/v1/realtime?model=grok-voice-latest

| Model | Description | |
|---|---|---|
| `grok-voice-think-fast-1.0` | Flagship voice model | |
| `grok-voice-fast-1.0` | Legacy voice model | deprecated |

> `grok-voice-latest` always points to the newest model (currently `grok-voice-think-fast-1.0`).


===/developers/pricing===
# Pricing

### Text API Pricing

| Model | Context | Input / 1M tokens | Cached input / 1M tokens | Output / 1M tokens |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| grok-4.5 (< 200k prompt tokens) | 500k | $2.00 | $0.30 | $6.00 |
| grok-4.5 (≥ 200k prompt tokens) | 500k | $4.00 | $0.60 | $12.00 |
| grok-4.20-multi-agent-0309 (< 200k prompt tokens) | 1M | $1.25 | $0.20 | $2.50 |
| grok-4.20-multi-agent-0309 (≥ 200k prompt tokens) | 1M | $2.50 | $0.40 | $5.00 |

### Imagine Pricing

| Model | Cost |
|---|---|
| grok-imagine-image-quality | $0.05 / image |
| grok-imagine-video | $0.050 / sec |
| grok-imagine-video-1.5 | $0.080 / sec |

### Voice Pricing

| Mode | Cost |
|---|---|
| Realtime | $0.05 / min ($3.00 / hr) |
| Realtime Text Input | $0.004 / message (every conversation.item.create) |
| Text to Speech | $15.00 / 1M chars |
| Speech to Text | $0.10 / hr (REST), $0.20 / hr (Streaming) |

## Tools Pricing

| Tool | Tool Name | Description | Cost / 1k Calls |
|---|---|---|---|
| Web Search | `web_search` | Search the web | $5 |
| X Search | `x_search` | Search X | $5 |
| Code Execution | `code_execution`, `code_interpreter` | Run code | $5 |
| File Attachments | `attachment_search` | Search attachments | $10 |
| Collections Search | `collections_search`, `file_search` | Search collections | $2.50 |


===/developers/migration/may-15-retirement===
# Grok Model Retirement on May 15, 2026

Effective May 15, 2026 at 12:00 PM PT, the following models will be retired:

* `grok-3`
* `grok-imagine-image-pro`

### How the redirects work

## Recommended Replacements

| Model being retired | Redirect target after May 15 |
|---|---|
| `grok-3` | `grok-4.3` with `none` reasoning effort |
| `grok-imagine-image-pro` | `grok-imagine-image-quality` |


===/developers/release-notes===
# Release Notes

## July

### Grok 4.5

Grok 4.5 is now available.

## April

### Grok Voice Think Fast 1.0 is available

You can now use `grok-voice-think-fast-1.0`.

## March

### Grok 4.20 Multi-agent is live

Use `grok-4.20-multi-agent` for multi-agent research.

## December 2025

### Grok Voice Agent API is released

The Voice Agent API is generally available.
